query: SELECT p.id, p.codigo, LEFT(p.descricao, 25) as descricao, p.nomeMedico, p.crmMedico, a.nome as arquivo FROM procedimentos p JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT p.id, p.codigo, LEFT(p.descricao, 25) as descricao, p.nomeMedico, p.crmMedico, a.nome as arquivo FROM procedimentos p JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 15;
